tasks.title: Add missing module docstrings to core files
evidence: crates/ralph/src/config.rs, crates/ralph/src/lib.rs, crates/ralph/src/init_cmd.rs, and crates/ralph/src/scan_cmd.rs lack top-of-file //! module docstrings.
AGENTS.md requires every code file to have a docstring describing its purpose.
plan: Add concise module-level docstrings to the missing files.
Keep descriptions consistent with existing module docs.
Ensure prompts reflect the desired and required functionality for this task.

tasks.title: Treat rejected tasks as terminal in queue stats
evidence: crates/ralph/src/reports.rs computes completion rate using status==Done only, so rejected tasks are counted as active.
plan: Decide whether rejected should count as completed (terminal) and update stats logic.
Adjust output text to reflect the new definition.
Add tests for completion rate and active counts with rejected tasks.
Ensure prompts reflect the desired and required functionality for this task.
